pages.title: Void Slob
pages.text: Slobs, such a disgusting name, but that's what the void called them. They are a mangled mass of Shards plus Essence, they are the heart of making precious ingots, this one makes a Void Ingot a material that is made by smelting them in a furnace or blast furnace.

Be careful though, these Slobs are unstable and should not be carried for long. So it's best to either smelt them quickly, or store them safely inside a chest/container so they don't start killing you.

pages.title: Infernal Slob
pages.text: Like the previous one, this is a mangled mass of Shards plus Essence, this one makes Infernal ingots, a material of which are made by smelting them in a furnace or blast furnace.

Be careful though, these Slobs are unstable and should not be carried for long. So it's best to either smelt them quickly, or store them safely inside a chest/container so they don't start killing you.

pages.title: Cosmic Slob
pages.text: Like the previous one, this is a mangled mass of Shards plus Essence, this one makes Cosmic ingots, a final tier material of which are made by smelting them in a furnace or blast furnace.

Be careful though, these Slobs are unstable and should not be carried for long. So it's best to either smelt them quickly, or store them safely inside a chest/container so they don't start killing you.
